sources.page_title: GYEON Q²M Preserve 250 ml - Gyeon.de | Buy Premium Car Care Products
sources.cleaned_content:
GYEON Q²M Preserve 250 ml

SKU: Q2MPRES250

- Plastic care for the interior and exterior
- Creates a matte surface
- With UV blocker, acts as dirt-repellent
- Non-greasy formula

Category: Interior care, Plastic care

Warnings according CLP regulation: WARNING! H319 - Causes serious eye irritation.

Price: 13,00 € (52,00 € per 1 l) incl. 19% VAT, plus shipping costs

Availability: Available immediately
Delivery time: 1 - 3 Workdays (DE - int. shipments may differ)

Description

Gyeon Q²M Preserve is a water-based care and protection product designed to refresh plastics such as interior trims, faded moldings, and attachments. It has color-enhancing, dirt-repellent, and UV protection properties.

Q²M Preserve forms a matte, invisible film on the treated plastic, preserving the surface from premature aging caused by UV radiation. It restores the natural look of slightly faded plastic and vinyl surfaces, dries completely, and creates an anti-static surface that repels dust and keeps dirt at bay. As a result, treated surfaces stay cleaner for longer and require less frequent maintenance.

Application

- Thoroughly clean plastic with GYEON VinylCleaner
- Remove contamination using a GYEON BaldWipe
- Spray a small amount of GYEON Preserve onto an MF Applicator
- Allow it to dwell and wipe off after a short time
- Can be diluted from 1:1 to 1:5

FAQ

Question: Can Q²M Preserve be diluted?
Answer: Yes, it can be diluted up to 1:5 with water and used as a dressing for, for example, engine bay trims.

Question: How should I apply it to achieve a matte surface?
Answer: Wipe off with a microfiber towel approximately 5 minutes after application for a matte finish.

Features

- Durability: up to 3 months
- Consumption: 50 ml / per vehicle

Gyeon Q2M Preserve - 250 ml

Brand: Gyeon
Item #: GYE-GY-1970
Manufacturer #: GY-1970

Price: $12.99

Availability: Out of stock

Product Details

Features:
- Easily enhance and protect plastic trim
- Can be used on all plastic and rubber pieces
- Restores faded trim
- Easy and efficient to use

Restore and protect plastic trim at the same time. Q²M Preserve is a wonderfully simple to use water based dressing for all plastic, trim, and rubber. It will bring back the healthy sheen to faded plastic and protect the trim from UV damage. This trim dressing is not greasy or shiny, leaving a very natural satin look.

NATURAL SATIN FINISH
Q²M Preserve creates an invisible layer that does not affect the look or feel of even the softest vinyl trim in any way. This trim dressing simply coats the trim to ensure its good looks remain the same as the day you bought it.

VERSATILE PROTECTION
Q²M Preserve can be used on every plastic and rubber piece of the car. It is perfect for exterior lower trim, engine bay plastics, interior trim and plastics, and rubber surrounds. Its easy application make it the perfect trim protectant for regular maintenance use with surprisingly long lasting durability.

PRO TIP
On interior trim, use a very small amount of product and rub it into the surface with the Q²M MF Applicator. Wipe after 5 minutes since application for a fully matte finish.

TIP: Dilute up to 1:5 and use as a spray on dressing for engine bays or wheels wells.

CONSUMPTION: 50ML/CAR
PH LEVEL: NEUTRAL
DURABILITY: UP TO 3 MONTHS

Specifications

- Manufacturer #: GY-1970
- Item #: GYE-GY-1970

- Container Size: 250 ml
- Ready to Use/Concentrated: Ready to Use

sources.cleaned_content:
GYEON Q²M Preserve

Price: $16.00

Item Quick Facts
- Easily enhance and protect plastic trim.
- Can be used on all plastic and rubber surfaces.
- Restores faded trim.
- Easy and efficient application.

Use & Specifications

250 mL bottle. On interior trim, use a very small amount of product and rub it into the surface with the Q²M MF Applicator. Wipe after 5 minutes since application for a fully matte finish. You can also dilute up to 1:5 and use as a spray on dressing for engine bays or wheels wells.

Consumption: 50mL per car. pH neutral. Durability of up to 3 months.

Description

Restore and protect plastic trim at the same time. Q²M Preserve is a wonderfully simple to use water based dressing for all plastic, trim, and rubber. It will bring back the healthy sheen to faded plastic and protect the trim from UV damage. It is not greasy or shiny, leaving a very natural satin look.
